alignments.json_text: I'm busy. I'm off to smack you as I said.
alignments.wiki_text: I'm 'bout to smack ya, how does that sound?
alignments.proposed_text: I'm 'bout to smack ya, how does that sound?

alignments.json_text: I'm busy. You can't smack me around because I'll kill you.
alignments.wiki_text: I'm busy. You can't smack me around, 'cause I'll kill you.
alignments.proposed_text: I'm busy. You can't smack me around, 'cause I'll kill you.

alignments.json_text: You want me up with my whip?
alignments.wiki_text: You gonna meet up wi' my whip? [exhale]
alignments.proposed_text: You gonna meet up wi' my whip? [exhale]

alignments.json_text: I'll kill the whip. I'll kill them all.
alignments.proposed_text: I'll kill the whip. I'll kill them all.

alignments.json_text: Wouldn't come close. You hear we're not talking.
alignments.wiki_text: I'll kill the whip. |I'll kill 'em all. You wouldn't come close. You hear what I'm talkin'?
alignments.proposed_text: I'll kill the whip. |I'll kill 'em all. You wouldn't come close. You hear what I'm talkin'?
